name: Jiang Gong
page_title: Jiang Gong 江宫 – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes: Jiang Gong was one of the bandit leaders living between the Huai and Ru rivers along with Shen Cheng and Qu Gong. Around AD 200, Li Tong began launching campaigns to clear them out and they were eventually destroyed. Li Tong delivered their heads to Cao Cao which earned him the title Marquis of a Chief Commune and was appointed Grand Administrator of Runan for his deeds.

full_text:
Jiang Gong 江宫
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Jiang Gong (江宫)was born in Runan. Bandit who was defeated and killed by Li Tong. Jiang Gong lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.

BiographyHistoric (Confirmed)
Jiang Gong was one of the bandit leaders living between the Huai and Ru rivers along with Shen Cheng and Qu Gong. Around AD 200, Li Tong began launching campaigns to clear them out and they were eventually destroyed. Li Tong delivered their heads to Cao Cao which earned him the title Marquis of a Chief Commune and was appointed Grand Administrator of Runan for his deeds.
